--- !bad_match_empty_properties.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
MATCH (a {})
RETURN a

--- Error
syntax error: testdata/input/gql/!bad_match_empty_properties.sql:2:11: expected token: <ident>, but: }
  2|  MATCH (a {})
   |            ^


--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.BadGQLLinearQueryStatement{
        BadNode: &ast.BadNode{
          NodePos: 15,
          NodeEnd: 36,
          Tokens:  []*token.Token{
            &token.Token{
              Kind:     "<ident>",
              Space:    "\n",
              Raw:      "MATCH",
              AsString: "MATCH",
              Pos:      15,
              End:      20,
            },
            &token.Token{
              Kind:  "(",
              Space: " ",
              Raw:   "(",
              Pos:   21,
              End:   22,
            },
            &token.Token{
              Kind:     "<ident>",
              Raw:      "a",
              AsString: "a",
              Pos:      22,
              End:      23,
            },
            &token.Token{
              Kind:  "{",
              Space: " ",
              Raw:   "{",
              Pos:   24,
              End:   25,
            },
            &token.Token{
              Kind: "}",
              Raw:  "}",
              Pos:  25,
              End:  26,
            },
            &token.Token{
              Kind: ")",
              Raw:  ")",
              Pos:  26,
              End:  27,
            },
            &token.Token{
              Kind:     "<ident>",
              Space:    "\n",
              Raw:      "RETURN",
              AsString: "RETURN",
              Pos:      28,
              End:      34,
            },
            &token.Token{
              Kind:     "<ident>",
              Space:    " ",
              Raw:      "a",
              AsString: "a",
              Pos:      35,
              End:      36,
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph MATCH (a {}) RETURN a
